text.title: AI-Generated Test Audit Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to apply the audit on a PR.

step.name: detect-ai-involvement
step.action: Confirm the PR includes tests authored or significantly assisted by an AI assistant (label, commit message, or PR description).
step.decision-gate: If no AI involvement or single-line completion only, STOP — methodology does not apply.

step.name: run-pre-lint
step.action: Run pre-lint detector on diff; record mocks-per-test, structural-only count, failure-case presence.

step.name: walk-checklist
step.action: Reviewer walks all 12 items; assigns verdict (pass / flag / n/a) per item; writes repair_request for each flag.

step.name: set-overall-verdict
step.action: Compute overall_verdict: approve only if all items pass or n/a; request_changes if any flag; block if structural-or-mock-only.

step.name: validate-and-post
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-qa-ai-generated-test-audit-checklist.py --file checklist.json`; post checklist YAML in PR description.
